skills.name: architect
skills.description: System & software architecture — options, trade-offs, boundaries, ADRs, with references on decision-making, styles, reliability & scale

skills.name: developer
skills.description: Implement features & fix bugs matching existing patterns, with verification; references on understanding code, testing, and debugging

skills.name: k8s-administrator
skills.description: Kubernetes operations, debugging, rollouts, and workload hygiene; references for the failure playbook, manifests, and RBAC/security

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Author high-quality, portable SKILL.md skills — description engineering, progressive disclosure, bundled validator, and testing

skills.name: code-reviewer
skills.description: Diff/PR review — bugs, security, reuse, style, ranked by severity; references for the review checklist and severity/feedback

skills.name: devops-cicd
skills.description: CI/CD pipelines, Docker images, IaC, and release strategy; references on pipelines, containers, and IaC/release

skills.name: security-engineer
skills.description: Threat modeling, secure-coding review, and vulnerability triage (defensive); references on STRIDE, the secure-coding checklist, and triage

skills.name: tech-writer
skills.description: READMEs, ADRs, runbooks, API docs — clear, structured, example-driven; references on doc types and writing style

skills.name: observability-engineer
skills.description: Logs, metrics, traces, SLOs, and alerting; references on the three pillars, SLOs/alerting, and dashboards/debugging

skills.name: ceo-corporation
skills.description: Executive leadership — strategy, capital & people allocation, high-stakes decisions, and stakeholder communication; references on strategy, decisions/capital, and comms

skills.name: ai-agent
skills.description: Design & build LLM agents — the agent decision, tool-use loop, context management, model choice, and evals; references incl. a Claude quick-start

skills.name: mcp-server
skills.description: Build Model Context Protocol servers — tools, resources, prompts, transports, and security; references on concepts, building with the SDK, and design/security
